creator: _jkrow
caption:
Don’t waste your weekends going to the wrong places in Upstate NY 

These are some of the most beautiful state parks in NY and they’re all easy to get to from NYC, Rochester and Buffalo 

If you’ve been wanting a quick trip that doesn’t take a lot of time, this is exactly where I’d go (+ spring is the best time to see the waterfalls!) 

WHAT TO KNOW:

💰 Parking is $10 per vehicle or free with an Empire Pass

🎟️ Your parking pass is good for the entire day and is valid for other New York State Parks, including nearby Taughannock Falls State Park, Buttermilk Falls State Park, and Robert H Tremain. So you can visit multiple parks without having to pay again!

——
Save this for your next weekend!

If you want my full weekend getaway guide with 3 day itineraries around the world, say “WEEKEND” and I’ll send it to you ✈️

transcription.text: No, seriously, what is this place? This is heaven.
